title: XFUNDS Launches DRMY, a New Semiconductor ETF That Sells Options for Monthly Income
excerpt: A new ETF just bet that memory chips and options premiums can coexist in one fund, but with 8 to 15 holdings and a 1.01% fee, the tradeoffs for income-seekin...
content_html:
Michael Williams

Tue, July 21, 2026 at 10:24 AM CDT 5 min read

Quick Read

  • DRMY pairs concentrated exposure to between 8 and 15 memory-chip stocks across the U.S., South Korea, Japan, and Taiwan with an options overlay designed to generate income distributions.

  • At 1.01%, the fund's fee tops most comparable semiconductor income ETFs, and selling options to fund distributions caps gains during sharp market rallies.

  • Are you ahead, or behind on retirement? SmartAsset's free tool can match you with a financial advisor in minutes to help you answer that today. Each advisor has been carefully vetted, and must act in your best interests. Don't waste another minute; learn more here.

A new semiconductor-themed income fund began trading on the NYSE Arca: the XFUNDS™ Memory Income ETF (NYSEARCA:DRMY). The fund is issued through Tidal Trust II, with Tidal Investments LLC as investment adviser and Nicholas Wealth, LLC as sub-adviser. Its prospectus is dated July 14, 2026.

DRMY carries a total annual operating expense ratio of 1.01%, which works out to roughly $101 a year on a $10,000 investment. That figure breaks down into a 0.99% management fee and 0.02% in other expenses, with no 12b-1 distribution fees. The fund's primary objective is capital appreciation, with a secondary objective of current income.

What the Fund Does

DRMY is an actively managed ETF, meaning a portfolio team picks the holdings rather than following an index. It invests in what the prospectus calls "Memory Companies," defined as businesses that derive at least 50% of revenues or profits from the design, development, production, or manufacture of memory-related semiconductor products or storage technologies. That covers high bandwidth memory (HBM), DRAM, NAND flash and SSDs, NOR flash and hard disk drives, and specialty or embedded memory products.

_________________________________

What's Your Number...?

Here's a question most people 5y from retirement can't answer: at your current savings rate, how much do you need, and how long will it actually last? A good advisor can put a date on that in a single meeting. SmartAsset's free quiz matches you with up to three fiduciary advisors serving your area, so you can get YOUR retirement number now (sponsor)

__________________________________________

The portfolio is concentrated. The sub-adviser expects to hold approximately 8 to 15 companies, using a modified market capitalization weighting with a maximum weight of 25% for any single issuer. Holdings are rebalanced at least quarterly. Because so much of the world's memory manufacturing sits in Asia, the fund expects to focus on issuers in the United States, South Korea, Japan, and Taiwan, gaining foreign exposure through American and Global Depositary Receipts.

content_html_zh:
迈克尔·威廉姆斯

2026 年 7 月 21 日星期二上午 10:24 CDT 阅读时间 5 分钟

快速阅读

  • DRMY 将集中投资于美国、韩国、日本和台湾地区的 8 至 15 只内存芯片股票与旨在产生收入分配的期权叠加配对。
  • 该基金的费用为 1.01%，高于大多数同类半导体收益 ETF，并且在市场大幅上涨期间出售基金分配期权可以限制收益。
  • 你的退休年龄是领先还是落后？ SmartAsset 的免费工具可以在几分钟内为您匹配财务顾问，帮助您立即回答这个问题。 每位顾问都经过仔细审查，并且必须以您的最佳利益为出发点。 不要再浪费一分钟了；在这里了解更多信息。

一款新的半导体主题收益基金开始在 NYSE Arca 交易：XFUNDS™ 内存收益 ETF（NYSEARCA：DRMY）。 该基金通过 Tidal Trust II 发行，Tidal Investments LLC 担任投资顾问，Nicholas Wealth, LLC 担任副顾问。 其招股说明书日期为2026年7月14日。

DRMY 的年度总运营费用率为 1.01%，按 10,000 美元的投资计算，每年约为 101 美元。 该数字分为 0.99% 的管理费和 0.02% 的其他费用，不含 12b-1 分销费。 该基金的主要目标是资本增值，次要目标是当前收入。

基金的用途

DRMY 是一种主动管理的 ETF，这意味着投资组合团队选择持有的股票而不是跟随指数。 它投资于招股说明书中所称的“内存公司”，即至少 50% 的收入或利润来自内存相关半导体产品或存储技术的设计、开发、生产或制造的企业。 其中涵盖高带宽内存 (HBM)、DRAM、NAND 闪存和 SSD、NOR 闪存和硬盘驱动器以及专用或嵌入式内存产品。

_________________________________

你的电话号码是多少...？

这是大多数退休后 5 岁的人无法回答的问题：按照您目前的储蓄率，您需要多少资金，以及实际能维持多久？ 一个好的顾问可以在一次会议上确定日期。 SmartAsset 的免费测验为您匹配最多三名为您所在地区服务的信托顾问，这样您现在就可以获得您的退休号码（赞助商）

__________________________________________

投资组合集中。 该副顾问预计将持有大约 8 至 15 家公司，使用修改后的市值权重，任何单一发行人的最大权重为 25%。 持股至少每季度重新平衡一次。 由于全球大部分内存制造都位于亚洲，该基金预计将重点关注美国、韩国、日本和台湾的发行人，通过美国和全球存托凭证获得海外投资。
